title: Damage Function
description: Finally, a damage function for minecraft
body:
# What is this
A simple /damage function for datapack creators, because they deserve one.

# Syntax
> /damage <target> <amount> [<attacker>]
>
>/damage <target> <amount> [<damageSource>] [<attacker>]

Where:
- <target> = entity (can be multiple)
- <amount> = float
- <damageSource> = identifier
- <attacker> = entity (singular)
